SEARCH

Class ModelJUnitTest

java.lang.Object
ModelJUnitTest
public class ModelJUnitTest extends Object
ModelJUnitTest is a class consisting of multiple test methods for the Model class.
Version:
1.1
Author:
Magdalena Rapala

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model
    model
    model is an instance of Model class, whose public methods will be tested here.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ModelJUnitTest()
    ModelJUnitTest is an empty constructor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setUp()
    setUp method is a method that initiates the new Model instance before each test.
    void
    testRailFenceCorrect(String mode, String inputText, int inputRails, String expectedResult)
    testRailFenceCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
    void
    testRailFenceIncorrect(String mode, String inputText, int inputRails, String wrongResult)
    testRailFenceIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
    void
    testRailFenceNoMode(String inputText, int inputRails)
    testRailFenceNoMode is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without mode set.
    void
    testRailFenceNoModeOneRail(String inputText, int inputRails, String expectedResult)
    testRailFenceNoModeOneRail is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without mode set, but with one rail.
    void
    testRailFenceNoRails(String mode, String inputText)
    testRailFenceNoRails is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without rails set.
    void
    testSetModeCorrect(String input, String expected)
    testSetModeCorrect is a method that tests whether the method Model.setMode(java.lang.String) method correctly converts the input mode into lowercase mode.
    void
    testSetModeIncorrect(String input)
    testSetModeIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setMode(java.lang.String) for incorrect option.
    void
    testSetNoOfRailsCorrect(String inputText, int inputRails)
    testSetNoOfRailsCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
    void
    testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect(String inputText, int inputRails)
    testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
    void
    testSetNoOfRailsNoText(int inputRails)
    testSetNoOfRailsNoText is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
    void
    testSetTextCorrect(String input)
    testSetTextCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setText(java.lang.String).
    void
    testSetTextIncorrect(String input)
    testSetTextIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setText(java.lang.String).

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • model

      private pl.rapala.magdalena.railfence.model.Model model
      model is an instance of Model class, whose public methods will be tested here.

  • Constructor Details

    • ModelJUnitTest

      public ModelJUnitTest()
      ModelJUnitTest is an empty constructor.

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach public void setUp()
      setUp method is a method that initiates the new Model instance before each test.

    • testSetModeCorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"en,en","En,en","eN,en","EN,en","de,de","De, de","dE,de","DE,de","en ,en","de ,de"," en,en"," de,de"}) public void testSetModeCorrect(String input, String expected)
      testSetModeCorrect is a method that tests whether the method Model.setMode(java.lang.String) method correctly converts the input mode into lowercase mode.
      Parameters:
      input - the string mode value provided by the user.
      expected - the correct mode value.

    • testSetModeIncorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"MODE","Mode","enn","dee","e n","d e"}) @ValueSource(strings={" "," ","\t","\n"}) public void testSetModeIncorrect(String input)
      testSetModeIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setMode(java.lang.String) for incorrect option.
      Parameters:
      input - the incorrect value which differs from the accepted 'en', 'de' and all lowercase|uppercase permutations of it.

    • testSetTextCorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"gliwice","Katowice","Ala ma kota"," Ala ","Hej. Kotku, gdzie jestes?!","02.05.1989","\'.,?!\'"}) public void testSetTextCorrect(String input)
      testSetTextCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setText(java.lang.String).
      Parameters:
      input - the correct input text.

    • testSetTextIncorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"B\u0119dzin","/","_","\\",")","(","*","&","^","%","$","#"}) @ValueSource(strings={" ","","\t","\n"}) public void testSetTextIncorrect(String input)
      testSetTextIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setText(java.lang.String).
      Parameters:
      input - the incorrect input text.

    • testSetNoOfRailsCorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"Ala ma kota,2","Ala ma kota,11","Ala ma kota,1"}) public void testSetNoOfRailsCorrect(String inputText, int inputRails)
      testSetNoOfRailsCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
      Parameters:
      inputText - the correct input text.
      inputRails - the correct number of rails.

    • testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"Ala ma kota,0","Ala ma kota,-1","Ala ma kota,200","Ala ma kota,-0","Ala ma kota,12"}) public void testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect(String inputText, int inputRails)
      testSetNoOfRailsIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
      Parameters:
      inputText - the incorrect input text.
      inputRails - the incorrect number of rails.

    • testSetNoOfRailsNoText

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"0","1","200","12"}) public void testSetNoOfRailsNoText(int inputRails)
      testSetNoOfRailsNoText is a test method that tests the method Model.setNoOfRails(int).
      Parameters:
      inputRails - the number of rails, that cannot be set without the text.

    • testRailFenceCorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"en,Ala ma kota,2,Aam oal akt","en,Ala ma kota,1,Ala ma kota","de,Aam oal akt,2,Ala ma kota","de,Aam oal akt,1,Aam oal akt","en,okay,2,oaky","de,oaky,2,okay","en,ok,2,ok","de,ok,2,ok","en,a,1,a","de,a,1,a"}) public void testRailFenceCorrect(String mode, String inputText, int inputRails, String expectedResult)
      testRailFenceCorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
      Parameters:
      mode - the correct mode (Encoding, Decoding) for the cipher.
      inputText - the correct input text.
      inputRails - the correct number of rails.
      expectedResult - the expected result.

    • testRailFenceIncorrect

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"en,Ala ma kota,2,Ala ma kota","en,Ala ma kota,1,Aam oal akt","de,Aam oal akt,1,Ala ma kota","de,Aam oal akt,2,Aam oal akt"}) public void testRailFenceIncorrect(String mode, String inputText, int inputRails, String wrongResult)
      testRailFenceIncorrect is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() and its later called methods for encryption and decryption called Model.encode() and Model.decode().
      Parameters:
      mode - the correct mode (Encoding, Decoding) for the cipher.
      inputText - the correct input text.
      inputRails - the correct number of rails.
      wrongResult - the incorrect result of the cipher, should not be equal to the inputText.

    • testRailFenceNoMode

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"Ala ma kota,2","Aam oal akt,2"}) public void testRailFenceNoMode(String inputText, int inputRails)
      testRailFenceNoMode is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without mode set.
      Parameters:
      inputText - the correct input text.
      inputRails - the correct number of rails for the cipher.

    • testRailFenceNoModeOneRail

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"Ala ma kota,1,Ala ma kota","Aam oal akt,1,Aam oal akt"}) public void testRailFenceNoModeOneRail(String inputText, int inputRails, String expectedResult)
      testRailFenceNoModeOneRail is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without mode set, but with one rail.
      Parameters:
      inputText - the correct input text for the cipher.
      inputRails - the correct number of rails for the cipher.
      expectedResult - the expected result, which should equal to the inputText.

    • testRailFenceNoRails

      @ParameterizedTest @CsvSource({"en,Ala ma kota","de,Aam oal akt"}) public void testRailFenceNoRails(String mode, String inputText)
      testRailFenceNoRails is a test method that tests the method Model.railFence() without rails set.
      Parameters:
      mode - the correct mode for the cipher.
      inputText - the correct input text for the cipher.
